case_title: BI-RITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO., INC. VS. CHS/HOTEL G, LLC DBA AYALA RESTAURANT ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BI-RITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO., INC. DBA BI-RITE FOODSERVICE DISTRIBUTORS AS TO DEFENDANT CHS/HOTEL G, LLC DBA AYALA RESTAURANT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2021
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66069121) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BI-RITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO., INC. DBA BI-RITE FOODSERVICE DISTRIBUTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHS/HOTEL G, LLC DBA AYALA RESTAURANT $8,069.97 PRINCIPAL, $1,150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $607.41 INTEREST, $305.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,132.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66069121)
